title: M3: TLS/TCPS + ewallet.pem + tnsnames/IFILE + connect-string corpus differential (anti-fake-parity); cwallet.sso value-add

M5: Arrow dataframes (arrow-rs RecordBatch + C Data Interface shim export) + direct path load (TTC 128/129/130) — modules 8000-9400,9600,9700 match-or-beat baseline; upstream-WIP bugs fixed not reproduced (Q7)
M6: Gauntlet certification — filtered 72-module suite matches-or-beats baseline, fuzz clean, fake-parity sweep, perf vs python-oracledb+rust-oracle incl. bulk-load
M4: DbObject/XMLType + OSON/JSON + VECTOR + pool/DRCP + pipelining + sessionless txn + all async modules
M2: execute/fetch/binds + core scalar types + LOB/LONG — suite 1000-5200 series matches baseline
notes: M2 checkpoint: added tokenized connect-argument marshalling between the pytest shim and Rust pyshim so Python-only connection inputs (password, newpassword, and malformed user@dsn) reach ThinConnImpl without stale queue leakage. This closes the hidden bad-password/connect-time password-change gap: focused live tests test_1105, test_1106, and test_1127 now pass. Current full live reference/python-oracledb/tests/test_1100_connection.py baseline is 50 passed / 5 failed / 7 skipped. Remaining failures are DBMS_LOCK/sleep cancel-timeout environment gap (1126/1131), ThinPoolImpl placeholder (1134), and EndUserSecurityContext placeholders (1160/1161). Gates: cargo fmt --all --check, cargo check -p oracledb-pyshim, maturin develop, focused pytest 1105/1106/1127, full live test_1100_connection.py, cargo test -p oracledb-protocol -p oracledb -p oracledb-pyshim, ubs on crates/oracledb-pyshim/src/lib.rs and harness/shim_inject/__init__.py, git diff --check, and pythontest password verification all completed. UBS exited 0; full connection file intentionally remains red only on the five known remaining gaps.

title: M1: Connect + 12c/11g auth + identity masquerade gate (v$session reflects caller-set osuser/program/machine) + test_1100 green
notes: M1 progress: Rust thin CONNECT/ACCEPT, fast auth phase one/two, 12c verifier, marker reset, server piggyback skip, ping, close are live-green against localhost:1522/FREEPDB1. PyO3 ThinConnImpl now bridges public oracledb.connect() to Rust for connect attributes, ping, close using harness env password. Identity gate verified via reference query: program/machine/terminal/osuser/client_driver matched Rust-set values. Remaining M1 gate blocker: python-oracledb test_1100 setup calls conn.cursor() for env initialization; ThinConnImpl.create_cursor_impl is still an explicit placeholder, so execute/fetch cursor implementation is next.
close_reason: Completed M1: Rust thin auth/connect, execute/fetch text cursor, identity gates test_1146-test_1150, and python-oracledb test_1100 pass through PyO3 shim
